title: Excise taxes and other levies technical information - Canada.ca
content:
## Excise taxes and other levies technical information
The CRA publishes technical publications that provide information on excise taxes under the Excise Tax Act on certain petroleum products; fuel-inefficient vehicles; and air conditioners designed for use in automobiles, station wagons, vans, or trucks as well as on tax imposed on insurance premiums.

## Publications and information

### Current rates of excise taxes
Current rates of excise taxes on petroleum products, fuel-inefficient vehicles, air conditioners, and insurance premiums other than marine
Announcements relating to policy changes that affect the application and administration of excise taxes and the tax on insurance premiums

### Rates of excise tax on fuel-inefficient vehicles
Lists of automobiles and the associated excise tax rates, arranged by model year
Detailed technical information on various topics relating to the application of excise taxes and the tax on insurance premiums
Forms required under the Excise Tax Act for excise taxes and the tax on insurance premiums
How to verify an excise tax account's licensing status

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
